companies.name: Marvell Technology, Inc.
companies.reason: Trending after Yahoo Finance highlighted comments from Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang at COMPUTEX 2026 calling Marvell a potential next trillion-dollar company, drawing attention to its AI infrastructure and custom silicon exposure.

companies.name: Broadcom Inc.
companies.reason: In the news after its latest earnings update pressured chip stocks, with reports noting weaker-than-expected fiscal Q2 revenue and investor caution despite Broadcom maintaining a long-term AI chip revenue outlook.

companies.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
companies.reason: Trending as an AI-linked semiconductor name, with Reuters noting its shares have surged sharply amid the broader AI technology stock rally and recent market focus on memory demand tied to AI infrastructure.
